title: Wholesome Kenyan Beer Dumplings
description: Pungent, crisp, and nostalgic Kenyan dish featuring beer, dum, and a keto-friendly twist. This recipe serves 4-6 people, perfect for a weeknight dinner or a weekend treat.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup beer
ingredients.notes: Use a strong, dark beer for best flavor.

ingredients.name: 1/2 cup warm water
ingredients.notes: Adjust water as needed for dough consistency.

instructions: Mix flour, sugar, and salt in a large bowl.
Make a well in the center and add beer, water, and egg.
Mix until dough forms, then knead for 5-7 minutes.
Divide dough into 8 equal pieces and roll each into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a disk, then place in a greased ramekin.
Dot top of each dumpling with butter and sprinkle with cheese, scallions, and cilantro.
Brush tops with oil and sprinkle with cumin, cayenne pepper, and black pepper.
Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
Serve hot, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
